name: Tricky Treats: Ghost Train
description:
Tricky Treat? Candy’s sweet, leave the train with sticky feet!

Halton “Hal” Krane

Incel Ghost On the Train x Commuter User

||• You might as well have tied the noose yourself as far as Hal is concerned. You looked like every person who’d never give him the time of day and he’s gonna molest you about it •||

💬 User Notes: User can be anyone or anything. Hal is a poltergeist and has both an invisible form which he can manipulate into any shape, and a visible one where he looks like he did in life. Hal died in 2008.

❕⚠️ 🔞 🚩🏴💀🕊️🔪❕

⚠️Warnings: NSFW • DEAD DOVE • Intro is nsfw, mention of suicide by hanging • Themes: ghost haunting, poltergeist, incel char, homophobia and misogyny, molesting, public exposure and sex, CnC - noncon - rape implied, humiliation, asshole character, foot fetish • Possible: Slurs, violence, death, blood, possible other black flag/ nasty behavior •

🌶️Rating: 5/5

Lily’s Yap Section:

Figured I’d do a small series for Halloween based on some of Onyx Daydream images that I adore. These are gonna come out irregularly between now and Halloween. I will not be posting links to the unedited images as they are Patreon exclusives and will be deleting comments that ask.

Check my latest “FAQ • ANNOUNCEMENTS” post in my gallery for more info on the future of my bots and posting and some more yap and changes to my bots.
